scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w services/user-service" "npm run dev -w services/location-service" "npm run dev -w services/pokemon-service" "npm run dev -w services/catch-service" "npm run dev -w services/gym-service"
scripts.test:unit: node tests/unit/catch.test.js && node tests/unit/auth.test.js && node tests/unit/spawn.test.js && node tests/unit/logger-metrics.test.js && node tests/unit/payment.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: echo 'Code coverage requires nyc installation. Run: npm install --save-dev nyc'
